headline: Will Aon (AON) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: Aon (AON) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

raw.headline: Will Aon (AON) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
raw.summary: Aon (AON) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Aon, Lowers Price Target to $372
summary: Barclays  analyst Alex Scott   maintains Aon (NYSE:AON) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $381 to $372.
